prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 2×1 character pose sheet for a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; preserve the exact young scholar identity, face, topknot, blue-gray robe, tea-brown sash, blank book bundle and handmade paper construction
Primary request: two complete full-body poses of the same young Li Bai, one per equal horizontal cell: 1 walking uphill with renewed purpose and the same book bundle on his back; 2 seated at a low writing desk, calm and focused, brush lowered toward a blank page
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage matching Image 1, fibrous torn edges, restrained ink, matte mineral pigments
Composition/framing: exact 2 columns × 1 row, consistent scale and identity, generous padding, no overlap, complete head, hands and feet
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background in both cells, no floor, shadows, gradient, texture or divider
Constraints: no written marks on page, text, label, watermark, logo, extra people, modern items or #ff00ff in figure; stable anatomy and costume
Avoid: anime, chibi, photorealism, glossy 3D, cropped or duplicated limbs, identity drift
